project.name: 校园论坛设计稿
project.styleDefinitionBrief: 校园论坛，清新文艺风，teal绿主色调+暖白底，Playfair Display衬线标题+Inter正文，诗情画意卡片布局，边框层叠表面
project.designRead: campus forum / college students / fresh literary youthful / medium density / avoid generic blue-purple tech hero

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: teal green #0d9488 used for primary CTA, active states, and accent highlights
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: single brand hue only; no secondary or accent brand colors; categories/roles use neutral tints or primary tints
colorSystem.stateColors: success #16a34a, warning #d97706, error #dc2626, info #0284c7 for semantic states only

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: restrained radius: sm=4px, md=8px, lg=12px, xl=16px, full=9999px; max radius 16px
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: display: Playfair Display + Noto Serif SC; body: Inter + Noto Sans SC; mono: JetBrains Mono
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: 4px base grid, comfortable spacing for reading-heavy pages
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: border-first cards, subtle surface layering, clean button shapes, minimal decoration
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: static cards use border + 0.04 alpha shadow; floating layers (modal/dropdown) use deeper shadows
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: emoji as board icons per seed data; CSS patterns for visual interest; no hero image generation needed
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: light hover feedback, smooth transitions, no heavy animations

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: fixed top header with logo left, nav links center, auth/actions right; max-w-6xl centered content
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: Playfair Display for h1/h2 headings, Inter + Noto Sans SC for body, serif for literary flavor
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: white cards with border + subtle shadow, border-first approach
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: rounded-lg primary teal buttons, gray secondary buttons, hover lifts with shadow transition
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: left-aligned content with generous padding, centered headers for landing feel

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Teal green primary, Playfair Display serif headings, Inter body, warm white backgrounds, border-first cards, restrained radius, literary campus tone

pages.title: 首页 - 板块列表
pages.businessScenario: Main landing page showing all forum boards/categories as a grid of cards with icons, names, descriptions, and post counts
pages.visualNorthStar: A welcoming campus town square feel with literary flavor — warm, inviting, organized like a bulletin board with character
pages.compositionPattern: centered header with literary tagline + grid of icon cards with gentle hover states

pages.title: 板块详情 - 帖子列表
pages.businessScenario: Shows all posts in a specific board as a list with title, author, view count, vote count, and date
pages.visualNorthStar: Clean reading list with clear hierarchy — scannable post titles with supporting metadata in a comfortable reading width
pages.compositionPattern: top bar with board name + new post CTA + vertical post list with metadata row

pages.title: 帖子详情 - 评论
pages.businessScenario: Full post content display with author info, view count, and comment thread below with a reply form
pages.visualNorthStar: Comfortable reading experience — generous line height, clear article separation from comments, warm literary atmosphere
pages.compositionPattern: article card at top + comment count heading + comment list + reply form card at bottom

pages.title: 发帖
pages.businessScenario: Post creation form with board selector, title input, content textarea, anonymous toggle, and submit button
pages.visualNorthStar: Focused composition space — clean form with ample textarea area, minimal distractions, encouraging creative writing feel
pages.compositionPattern: centered form card with labeled fields + anonymous toggle + full-width submit CTA

pages.title: 登录
pages.businessScenario: User login with username/password fields, error display, login button, and register link
pages.visualNorthStar: Welcoming gate — centered card with warm literary heading, clean form, inviting register link
pages.compositionPattern: centered narrow card with literary heading + form fields + CTA + register link

pages.title: 注册
pages.businessScenario: User registration with username, email, password fields, error display, register button, and login link
pages.visualNorthStar: Friendly onboarding — centered card with encouraging heading, clean form, warm welcome feel
pages.compositionPattern: centered narrow card with literary heading + form fields + CTA + login link
